nasb.text: He commanded them, saying, “See, you are going to ambush the city from behind it. Do not go very far from the city, but all of you be ready.

esv.text: And he commanded them, “Behold, you shall lie in ambush against the city, behind it. Do not go very far from the city, but all of you remain ready.

cnv.text: 吩咐他們說：“你們注意，要在城後面埋伏攻城；不可離城太遠，人人都要作好準備。

ccb.text: 并吩咐他们说：“你们要在城后埋伏，不可离城太远，要随时准备行动。
